title: Getting Started with Clever
heading: Getting Started with Clever
content:
/\*! tailwindcss v4.1.17 | MIT License | https://tailwindcss.com \*/ @layer theme, base, components, utilities; @layer utilities;

Create your Clever development app, access the dashboard, build your integration, and prepare it for certification.

## 

Step 1: Create your development application

[](#step-1-create-your-development-application)

1.  Register for your development application at [https://www.clever.com/developer-signup](https://www.clever.com/developer-signup).
2.  Request access to additional integration types if you need them:
    -   For **Clever Single Sign-On**, **Clever Secure Sync**, or **Clever LMS Connect**, contact [\[email protected\]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#761706061a1f1517021f19185b1f1802130413050236151a130013045815191b).
3.  Build in a sandbox district environment during development.
4.  Plan for certification before working with live district data:
    -   Access to **live district data** requires **Clever certification**.
    -   Learn more in [Certification Overview](doc:certification-overview).
5.  Contact [\[email protected\]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#066f687263617467726f69687546656a637063742865696b) if you need a multi-application environment.

## 

Step 2: Access the applications dashboard

[](#step-2-access-the-applications-dashboard)

1.  Sign in with the dashboard account created for you during sign-up.
    -   Your username is your email address.
    -   You set your password when you accept the invite to your account.
2.  Configure dashboard SSO if you want to manage dashboard access through SAML.
    -   Dashboard SSO uses a **SAML** connection.
    -   During setup and testing, password access remains available for admin users and can remain available afterward by request.
    -   After SSO verification, password logins are disabled by default unless you request otherwise.
    -   To configure dashboard SSO, contact [\[email protected\]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#ee87809a8b899c8f9a8781809dae8d828b988b9cc08d8183).

## 

Step 3: Complete your build

[](#step-3-complete-your-build)

Choose the guide that matches the integration you want to build:

-   If you need a district-managed integration, start with [Clever Complete Integration Types and Quickstart Guides](https://dev.clever.com/docs/integration-types).
-   If you want to build without a Clever Complete subscription, start with [Clever Library - Overview](https://dev.clever.com/docs/library-sso).
-   If you are still deciding where to start, read [What is Clever?](https://dev.clever.com/docs/what-is-clever).

Then use the relevant product guide to build and test your integration.

## 

Step 4: Submit your app for certification

[](#step-4-submit-your-app-for-certification)

When your build is complete and ready to go live on Clever, submit your app for certification.

Read [Certification Overview](doc:certification-overview) to review the process and requirements.
